PREFACE

This edition has been prepared with the greatest of care, the editor having collated three surviving manuscripts and a quantity of marginal notes. This edition has been prepared with the greatest of care, the editor having collated three surviving manuscripts and a quantity of marginal notes. From an old and venerable volume, much quoted and little read, comes this remark upon the nature of the sea and of those who go down to it in ships.

From an old and venerable volume, much quoted and little read, comes this remark upon the nature of the sea and of those who go down to it in ships.

From an old and venerable volume, much quoted and little read, comes this remark upon the nature of the sea and of those who go down to it in ships.

CHAPTER I

And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead.

CHAPTER II

And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead.

CHAPTER III

And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead. And here at length begins the narrative proper, after so much preliminary matter, with the hero setting out upon his journey in the first cold light of an autumn morning, his whole life behind him and the unknown road ahead.
